canonical_definition: A dense retrieval model used as a black-box retriever component in the experimental setup to fetch documents from a Wikipedia index based on generated queries.
papers: Grounding by Trying: LLMs with Reinforcement Learning-Enhanced Retrieval
SiReRAG: Indexing Similar and Related Information for Multihop Reasoning
